programme.title: Mortal Kombat

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: An assassin takes his family on vacation, where he accidentally becomes the target of a bloodthirsty crime boss in this bare-knuckle action-thriller.

programme.title: Young Adult
programme.desc: When things are no longer what they used to be, a former prom queen and her friend realise that it is time for them to grow up.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three divorced women seek revenge on the husbands who left them for younger women.

programme.title: Oblivion

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: the War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: The Lord of the Rings: the War of the Rohirrim tells the fate of the House of Helm Hammerhand, the legendary King of Rohan.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Grudge Match

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Shoot Me In The Heart
programme.desc: A young man develops schizophrenia after his mother's suicide. After he meets a kindred spirit at the psychiatric hospital, he forges a plan with the man to escape.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A radio DJ receives a letter written 23 years ago. Through the letter, the story of his first love and friendships of five friends are revealed.

programme.title: The Sheriff In Town
programme.desc: When a former police investigator from Busan suspects something off about a slick businessman from Seoul, the “sheriff” resolves to track his every move in order to keep his town safe.

programme.title: Gyeong-Ah's Daughter
programme.desc: After her husband passed away, Gyeong-ah relies on her daughter Yeon-su. But they barely meet each other. One day, Gyeong-ah gets an anonymous message about Yeon-su and goes into trauma...

programme.title: One Win
programme.desc: Woo-jin is the newly appointed manager of a girls' volleyball team which is going to disband. The new owner sold all ace players for money and asked the team to win at least once.

programme.title: Race To Freedom: Um Bok Dong
programme.desc: K-pop star Rain portrays Um Bok-dong, an unlikely hero in a government-organized bicycle race during the Japanese colonial era. Defeating Japanese rivals, his victories inspire locals and resistance fighters.

programme.title: Sisters On The Road
programme.desc: After her mother's death, Myung-eun meets her sister Myung-ju. They do not share the same father and decided to travel together to find Myung-eun's father. A secret of her father reveals...

programme.title: The Ghost Game
programme.desc: 6 students head to a underground reservoir and perform a necromancy ritual but nothing seems to happen. Terror unfolds when the ritual becomes a deadly curse and threatens their lives...

programme.title: The Beauty Inside Finale
programme.desc: Top actress Han Se-gye lives with others' appearance one week out of every month. Seo Do-jae is an executive director of an airline company, who suffers from prosopagnosia. The two fall in love eventually.

programme.title: My Puppy
programme.desc: A groom-to-be sets off with his friend to finding a new owner for his puppy.

programme.title: The Negotiation
programme.desc: An arms dealer kidnapped two Koreans in Bangkok where the hostages were in fact held in an abandoned children's home in South Korea, when the kidnapper's motivations becomes clearer.

programme.title: Love Me Ep9
programme.desc: Adapted from a Swedish drama, it tells the story of a woman who appears to live a perfect life holds a secret behind her loneliness.

programme.title: Love Me Ep10
programme.desc: Adapted from a Swedish drama, it tells the story of a woman who appears to live a perfect life holds a secret behind her loneliness.

programme.title: Ordinary Person
programme.desc: Sung-jin is a police officer involved in a conspiracy after he arrested a suspected murderer by chance. Gyu-nam make use of Sung-jin's weakness, his family, to strike a deal with him.

programme.title: The Moon
programme.desc: An astronaut is left stranded in space because of an accident during a spaceflight. The former director of the space centre strives to bring him home safely...

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Turtleneck is captured by Frederic Estes, Boss Baby and Tim attempt to rescue her, leading them to the terrifying "fun house" at the town fair

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Boss Baby is fired from Baby Corp;he attempts to navigate regular baby life in a Mommy/Daddy/Baby playgroup. Even worse;the playgroup’s other new member is Mega Fat;whose animatronic stuffie Wagby malfunctions and threatens the safety of the whole group. Meanwhile;Tim does everything he can to avoid doing his homework.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When the crowded bathroom situation at the local museum threatens baby love;Boss Baby leads his new team of playgroup babies on their first mission…and then their SECOND mission after a klepto baby in their group swipes a priceless artifact. In a continued attempt to avoid homework;Tim joins Boss Baby on his mission.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Viggo gets angry at the dragon riders continually interfering with his business and uses a deep sea dragon, the Submaripper, to control Berk's trade.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: During the week of the Midnight Sun where the sun doesn't set for a week, Hiccup must deal with sleep deprivation and a dangerous new dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup and the Riders, with help from Dagur hatch a plan to steal Berk's gold back.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Trollhunters are paused from action when their parents stage an intervention to get answers from the kids.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Trollhunters race to stop Gunmar from acquiring a powerful relic, and Jim must do the unthinkable to stop him!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Team Trollhunter discovers a surprising ally while trapped in a flooding tavern!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date— where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hummingbird didn't hum. She was called Songbird and Songbird thought she could sing like a Bird… but sadly that was not the case. All the animals tried to help Songbird improve her singing but nothing worked. What could they do?! Then Tortoise has an idea, maybe Songbird can sing without opening her beak!! Songbird agrees and hums the most beautiful hum Tinga Tinga has ever heard. From that day on Songbird was called Hummingbird. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Baboon didn't have a bare bottom and he was very naughty. Baboon loved to play tricks. He played tricks on Elephant. He played tricks on Ostrich. He even dared to play tricks on Lion, the King of Tinga Tinga! And then all the animals decided it was time for the tricks to stop and Baboon to get a dose of his own medicine. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat must deliver an old bath tub to Pencaster Lighthouse. But when he goes to collect it from Thompson Ground, the bath ends up rolling away into Greendale with Jess inside! When Pat catches up with the bath he finds PC Selby about to impound it for being an un-road-worthy vehicle. Pat explains it's a Special Delivery and at last gets on his way. But when he arrives in Pencaster Bay, Micawber and Jess between them manage to loosen the rope tying up the SDS Boat and it goes chugging off to sea with no one on board! So Pat and Jess use the bath as a boat and paddle out to rescue the boat then at last deliver the old bath to Chris. SDS Mission accomplished - mioaw!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is on holiday, so Sarah Gilbertson is looking after her dog Bonnie. She calls in on Pat and proves she has zero control over the dog. But there is only time for Jess to roll his eyes before Pat is called out on a special delivery - it's urgent! He has to deliver the RADARSCOPE (designed by Ted) to Mrs Goggins, who is up in Scotland! Pat has no idea what a radarscope is and neither does Ben. But they know what urgent means, so they spring into action and load it into Pat's jet plane. Back in Greendale Bonnie gives Sarah the slip, and PC Selby becomes embroiled in an escalating search... up in Scotland meanwhile, Pat lands but doesn't even get an explanation of the radarscope as time is pressing, and he, Jess, and their technological bit of kit are bundled into a boat and they set out over the loch... Loch Ness! While the search for mischievous Bonnie intensifies back home, Pat realizes they are searching for a creature of their own - the Loch Ness Monster!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Molecom is very grateful to Plugger for rescuing him after yet another of Flash's pranks. But Plugger is soon frustrated by Molecom's attempts to help… Meanwhile, Roary is trying hard to beat his best lap time.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Cici is fed up with never winning and decides not to take part in the race that day. Can Roary persuade her to change her mind?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Roary takes Loada on a jaunt to the beach… only to discover that sand and lorries don't mix too well!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: PC Pete and Nick are up at Silver hatch giving the cars their road tests. Is Maxi really going to be as good as he says he is or will he be unpleasantly surprised?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is in charge of the Swapsy Game. Everyone puts a toy into the Swapsy Wagon and takes a toy out! It's brilliant fun – until the fairies yo yo. disappears from the wagon altogether. Cloppycorn's very upset. No one will trust him to pull the wagon again! Noddy tells him not to worry. He's going to investigate and help Cloppycorn find the missing toys. With the help of Bumpy and Revs, Noddy uses his investigative skills to work out that the two fairies had taken out the yo yo themselves because they were worried Cloppycorn wouldn't look after it. They apologies to Cloppycorn and the swapsy game starts again. And this time, everyone plays together! Well done Noddy. Case closed!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is very upset unhappy because his special felt ball, Snuggleball, is missing. Noddy needs to investigate quickly! He follows the clues around Fable Forest and discovers that PatPat broke snuggleball by mistake when she rode over it with her scooter. Noddy asks PatPat to make a new snuggleball but Cloppycorn doesn't like it. It doesn't feel cuddly like his special toy. Clever Noddy asks everyone in Toyland to give the new snuggleball a big hug. When he takes the new snuggleball back to Cloppycorn it feels just as huggly and snuggly as the old ball. What a good idea, Noddy! Well done!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: New stickers, with a picture of a mysterious bandit, have appeared in Toyland. Clockwork Mouse begs Noddy to investigate. He finds himself going head to head with jealous Hoof who wants to prove that Noddy isn't the only investigator in Toyland. Hoof thinks he's solved the case in no time, but Noddy's attention to detail makes him realise the bandit isn't quite what he seems. Following all the clues Noddy realises that there isn't a sticker bandit at all! The stickers are flyers for a new play that Pat-Pat is putting on for all the toys. She is the ‘sticker bandit” – a character in the play! Panic over, everyone settles down to enjoy the show. Well done, Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The pirates are having a spring clean of their galleon, much to the annoyance of Pirate Stripes who wants to go on a treasure hunt. Later that day, the pirate treasure disappears! Oh no! Noddy needs to investigate at once. A strange new galleon appears on the horizon. Could it be Tina the Terrible? Has she stolen the treasure? Using all his detecting skills Noddy follows the clues to the DareDale Caves where he realises that the ship on the horizon isn't Tina the Terrible's galleon at all. It's the shadow of a toy ship! He works out that Pirate Stripes took the treasure so that they could go on a treasure hunt to look for it! Pirate Stripes apologises for taking the treasure and returns it. Pirate Captain tells her that they've had such fun hunting for the treasure that they should do it again! Well done, Noddy. You've saved the day!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. The team try to transform this jungle into a backyard just in time for the party. / Lula finds an angry goose on the loose, and Team Zenko need to get it out of the park before soccer camp starts.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When "something" starts snatching things and causing havoc in Marcus' house, Phoebe and the Dew Drops investigate only to find that it's a stray kitten that they need to catch and find a home for before Marcus returns home. But in the end, Marcus decides to take the kitty in, as his own. / Lola isn't very good at “Hide & Seek” so the Dew Drops help her improve her game. But she becomes so good that no one can find her! And now she’s going to be late to her own surprise tea party!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. But when Tag and Scooch show up at the racetrack, there’s lots of competition. And to complete the first challenge - a pedal car race - they’re going to have to work together.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When Skrap-It gets struck by lightning, he's suddenly smart and comes up with a plan for D-Structs to remove the Dinotrux from the crater for good.on truck! Full-on fun! Watch giant Ty Rux, his little buddy Revvit and the crew come face-to-face with evil D-Structs.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When the PALs and Snips get caught in a sandstorm, the girls must keep Snips calm and safe

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep cheats her way into being considered an adult; Grug learns he's no longer the strongest caveman and turns to a radical method for building brawn

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Sandy can't join animal wrestling she poses as “Mandy Monkhuahua”; In order to help Munk, Grug sticks super worms up his nose that make him smarter

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Stormfly is captured by a new enemy, Ryker Grimborn, and the Dragon Hunters, Hiccup, Toothless and the team must rescue her before it's too late

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: As Hiccup and Snotlout race to rescue the others from Ryker and the Dragon Hunters, they don't realize Dagur and Heather are working with the enemy

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Trouble
programme.desc: A pampered dog named Trouble must learn to live in the real world while trying to escape from his former owner's greedy children and must learn how to survive on the big-city streets.

programme.title: Prison on Fire 2
programme.desc: A convict befriends a fellow inmate and escapes from jail to visit his son in an orphanage.

programme.title: The Cursed: Dead Man's Prey
programme.desc: A mysterious serial murder cases take place by jaechaui (dead bodies which have risen from the dead and able to talk). These bodies are manipulated by someone.

programme.title: Brahms: The Boy 2
programme.desc: Terror strikes a young family when they move into a new home and their son discovers a hauntingly life-like porcelain doll called Brahms.

programme.title: Go-Go Sisters
programme.desc: Go-go sisters brings together two parallel stories about young ambitious teenage girls and middle-aged women who have experienced life's sweet spiciness.

programme.title: Polaroid
programme.desc: A teenage girl's discovery of a vintage Polaroid camera becomes a nightmare when she finds out that whoever takes their photo with it meet a tragic death soon afterward

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: An American sharpshooter engages in a deadly game of cat and mouse with an Iraqi sniper, who has him pinned behind a small chunk of concrete.

programme.title: Aloners
programme.desc: A solitary woman reevaluates her isolated existence after her neighbor dies alone in his apartment.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America
programme.desc: A Chinese amnesiac and his companions confront cowboys and Indians in the American West.

programme.title: Bullet Head
programme.desc: After a daring heist, three fugitives find themselves trapped in a warehouse with the law closing in and an even worse threat waiting inside

programme.title: The Goblin
programme.desc: Former gangster Doo-hyun, known as "Goblin", served time for his boss' murder to protect Young-min. Out of prison, Youngmin kidnaps Doo-hyun's daughter, forcing him to seek vengeance and reclaim his "Goblin" persona.

programme.title: Once a Thief
programme.desc: A romantic and action-packed story of three best friends, a group of high-end art thieves, who come into trouble when a love-triangle forms between them

programme.title: Death Forest 3 and Death Forest 4
programme.desc: Uchida Mayu is a high school student in a peaceful town near Tokyo. Meanwhile,, Mayu's uncle Uchida Kazuki is a freelancer writer, who chases after the hideous monster Yoshie who attacks people.

programme.title: Grizzy And The Lemmings: World Tour
programme.desc: It seems an epic battle took place in the cabin and Grizzy is missing, it's a strange case for the Lemmings.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean is asked to wear a sheep costume to help advertise Irma’s knitwear stall, but he gets stuck in it!

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Yosemite Sam tries to start a new country. Sylvester does not want to be put out for the night. Daffy keeps eating all the hamburgers Elmer cooks.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: When Rocky suggests that the Elmore Junior High kids skip school, the bus is boarded by criminals who seem to want to teach them the importance of school attendance. The masked culprits are clearly the children's parents, faking a heist to teach them a lesson. But when the police get involved for real, it becomes clear the parents aren't the ones pulling the strings.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: After doing a round of "extreme carting", Mordecai and Rigby accidentally crash the cart into a tree. Mr. Maellard tells Benson that he has to drive the cart to the dealership or he will be fired.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: The Cool Kids help Steven put some fun back in his life.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The Brain and Mallah continue dealing with Brian's messes, but when the henchman are in trouble, everyone works together.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears visit a medieval vegetable-village and Grizz is convinced he's the rightful king.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: The Snow Golem and his beseeching pup pay a visit to the Fire Kingdom.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Steven attempts to get two of his close friends to like each other.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby work overtime in order to get tickets to a Fist Pump concert. While working, they drink lots of coffee to keep them active.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: In the heart of Silicon Valley, Ben has to stop Victorian villain, Steam Smythe, from securing an epic power source sealed in a Tesla time capsule.

programme.title: Courage The Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: When an evil, rich, old man suffers a heart attack, his shadow escapes from him. The evil shadow descends on the farm, terrorizing our happy threesome.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai buys a new cologne to attract Margaret instead of hanging out with Rigby like he promised.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: After Tim Buktu's live stream is mysteriously cut short, Team Tennyson must attempt a rescue mission and break inside the highly confidential Area 55 in order to save him.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Stuck inside because of bad weather, the Titans play rainy day games after Robin convinces them that indoor activities will cheer up the clouds and make the rain stop.

programme.title: Super Shiro
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are detected on fish scales by the lake. When Shiro arrives at the frozen lake, he drills a hole in it and competes with Deca at smelt-fishing.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: Blossom's skepticism is put to the test when she believes she's encountered a space alien.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: When Alex brings home a basket of kittens, Clover smells a rat. Turns out she’s right as Clover gets catnapped by an evil villain who is determined to infiltrate WOOHP. But as the spies fight back, they realize this villain is not working alone…

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean is in a trance – barks like a dog and starts to dance.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: So she isn't left out of inside jokes, the Titans time travel to past adventures and insert Bumblebee into their memories.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: After stuffing himself with carrots, a big, round Bugs rolls over Elmer. Porky Pig takes a very painful trip through an automated car wash.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Sweetie competes in a cat vs. bird competition but faces pressure to win at all costs. Hamton and Babs go into soccer mom-mode cheering her on, while Plucky, at the Loo Bru, takes over Dizzy’s shift to prove he’s more selfless than Buster.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Buster, Plucky, and Hamton take an aptiTOON test that yields some surprising career prospects. Meanwhile, Babs and Sweetie’s relaxing dorm-cation is interrupted by a mysterious smell, and they can’t rest until they find the source.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Darwin has promised to play video games with Gumball, but there is a Banana Joe-shaped problem...

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Bugs’ new roommate is a big, big problem. Daffy builds a nest in Elmer’s satellite dish.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Hamton gets into medical school but soon realizes it’s not at all what he imagined. Buster desperately tries to find a way to bring his pal back to Acme Loo.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Babs and Buster are excited to get college jobs, but can they stand the heat cooking for the school chef?

programme.title: Mechamato
programme.desc: When Tokang the puppeteer sets up his puppet show at Warung Muhibah, a few of its cast look oddly familiar.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: It's the end of the school year, and as is tradition at Aberdale Elementary, Papa Marianio is slated to dish out his famous pizza - along with a spectacle of song and dance. As the kids wait in excitement, they share memories about times with Papa.

programme.title: The Amazing World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are devastated to learn that Mr Robinson - their favourite person in the world - is selling his house and leaving town. When they realise that making some final happy memories with Mr Robinson is not enough for them, they decide to stop him leaving, by sabotaging the sale.

programme.title: Grizzy And The Lemmings: World Tour
programme.desc: The Lemmings are throwing a big birthday party but Grizzy tries to crash it due to his sensible eyes.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Turtleneck is captured by Frederic Estes, Boss Baby and Tim attempt to rescue her, leading them to the terrifying "fun house" at the town fair

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Boss Baby is fired from Baby Corp;he attempts to navigate regular baby life in a Mommy/Daddy/Baby playgroup. Even worse;the playgroup’s other new member is Mega Fat;whose animatronic stuffie Wagby malfunctions and threatens the safety of the whole group. Meanwhile;Tim does everything he can to avoid doing his homework.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When the crowded bathroom situation at the local museum threatens baby love;Boss Baby leads his new team of playgroup babies on their first mission…and then their SECOND mission after a klepto baby in their group swipes a priceless artifact. In a continued attempt to avoid homework;Tim joins Boss Baby on his mission.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Viggo gets angry at the dragon riders continually interfering with his business and uses a deep sea dragon, the Submaripper, to control Berk's trade.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: During the week of the Midnight Sun where the sun doesn't set for a week, Hiccup must deal with sleep deprivation and a dangerous new dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup and the Riders, with help from Dagur hatch a plan to steal Berk's gold back.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Trollhunters are paused from action when their parents stage an intervention to get answers from the kids.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Trollhunters race to stop Gunmar from acquiring a powerful relic, and Jim must do the unthinkable to stop him!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Team Trollhunter discovers a surprising ally while trapped in a flooding tavern!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date— where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hummingbird didn't hum. She was called Songbird and Songbird thought she could sing like a Bird… but sadly that was not the case. All the animals tried to help Songbird improve her singing but nothing worked. What could they do?! Then Tortoise has an idea, maybe Songbird can sing without opening her beak!! Songbird agrees and hums the most beautiful hum Tinga Tinga has ever heard. From that day on Songbird was called Hummingbird. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Baboon didn't have a bare bottom and he was very naughty. Baboon loved to play tricks. He played tricks on Elephant. He played tricks on Ostrich. He even dared to play tricks on Lion, the King of Tinga Tinga! And then all the animals decided it was time for the tricks to stop and Baboon to get a dose of his own medicine. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat must deliver an old bath tub to Pencaster Lighthouse. But when he goes to collect it from Thompson Ground, the bath ends up rolling away into Greendale with Jess inside! When Pat catches up with the bath he finds PC Selby about to impound it for being an un-road-worthy vehicle. Pat explains it's a Special Delivery and at last gets on his way. But when he arrives in Pencaster Bay, Micawber and Jess between them manage to loosen the rope tying up the SDS Boat and it goes chugging off to sea with no one on board! So Pat and Jess use the bath as a boat and paddle out to rescue the boat then at last deliver the old bath to Chris. SDS Mission accomplished - mioaw!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is on holiday, so Sarah Gilbertson is looking after her dog Bonnie. She calls in on Pat and proves she has zero control over the dog. But there is only time for Jess to roll his eyes before Pat is called out on a special delivery - it's urgent! He has to deliver the RADARSCOPE (designed by Ted) to Mrs Goggins, who is up in Scotland! Pat has no idea what a radarscope is and neither does Ben. But they know what urgent means, so they spring into action and load it into Pat's jet plane. Back in Greendale Bonnie gives Sarah the slip, and PC Selby becomes embroiled in an escalating search... up in Scotland meanwhile, Pat lands but doesn't even get an explanation of the radarscope as time is pressing, and he, Jess, and their technological bit of kit are bundled into a boat and they set out over the loch... Loch Ness! While the search for mischievous Bonnie intensifies back home, Pat realizes they are searching for a creature of their own - the Loch Ness Monster!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Molecom is very grateful to Plugger for rescuing him after yet another of Flash's pranks. But Plugger is soon frustrated by Molecom's attempts to help… Meanwhile, Roary is trying hard to beat his best lap time.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Cici is fed up with never winning and decides not to take part in the race that day. Can Roary persuade her to change her mind?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Roary takes Loada on a jaunt to the beach… only to discover that sand and lorries don't mix too well!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: PC Pete and Nick are up at Silver hatch giving the cars their road tests. Is Maxi really going to be as good as he says he is or will he be unpleasantly surprised?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is in charge of the Swapsy Game. Everyone puts a toy into the Swapsy Wagon and takes a toy out! It's brilliant fun – until the fairies yo yo. disappears from the wagon altogether. Cloppycorn's very upset. No one will trust him to pull the wagon again! Noddy tells him not to worry. He's going to investigate and help Cloppycorn find the missing toys. With the help of Bumpy and Revs, Noddy uses his investigative skills to work out that the two fairies had taken out the yo yo themselves because they were worried Cloppycorn wouldn't look after it. They apologies to Cloppycorn and the swapsy game starts again. And this time, everyone plays together! Well done Noddy. Case closed!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is very upset unhappy because his special felt ball, Snuggleball, is missing. Noddy needs to investigate quickly! He follows the clues around Fable Forest and discovers that PatPat broke snuggleball by mistake when she rode over it with her scooter. Noddy asks PatPat to make a new snuggleball but Cloppycorn doesn't like it. It doesn't feel cuddly like his special toy. Clever Noddy asks everyone in Toyland to give the new snuggleball a big hug. When he takes the new snuggleball back to Cloppycorn it feels just as huggly and snuggly as the old ball. What a good idea, Noddy! Well done!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: New stickers, with a picture of a mysterious bandit, have appeared in Toyland. Clockwork Mouse begs Noddy to investigate. He finds himself going head to head with jealous Hoof who wants to prove that Noddy isn't the only investigator in Toyland. Hoof thinks he's solved the case in no time, but Noddy's attention to detail makes him realise the bandit isn't quite what he seems. Following all the clues Noddy realises that there isn't a sticker bandit at all! The stickers are flyers for a new play that Pat-Pat is putting on for all the toys. She is the ‘sticker bandit” – a character in the play! Panic over, everyone settles down to enjoy the show. Well done, Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The pirates are having a spring clean of their galleon, much to the annoyance of Pirate Stripes who wants to go on a treasure hunt. Later that day, the pirate treasure disappears! Oh no! Noddy needs to investigate at once. A strange new galleon appears on the horizon. Could it be Tina the Terrible? Has she stolen the treasure? Using all his detecting skills Noddy follows the clues to the DareDale Caves where he realises that the ship on the horizon isn't Tina the Terrible's galleon at all. It's the shadow of a toy ship! He works out that Pirate Stripes took the treasure so that they could go on a treasure hunt to look for it! Pirate Stripes apologises for taking the treasure and returns it. Pirate Captain tells her that they've had such fun hunting for the treasure that they should do it again! Well done, Noddy. You've saved the day!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. The team try to transform this jungle into a backyard just in time for the party. / Lula finds an angry goose on the loose, and Team Zenko need to get it out of the park before soccer camp starts.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When "something" starts snatching things and causing havoc in Marcus' house, Phoebe and the Dew Drops investigate only to find that it's a stray kitten that they need to catch and find a home for before Marcus returns home. But in the end, Marcus decides to take the kitty in, as his own. / Lola isn't very good at “Hide & Seek” so the Dew Drops help her improve her game. But she becomes so good that no one can find her! And now she’s going to be late to her own surprise tea party!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. But when Tag and Scooch show up at the racetrack, there’s lots of competition. And to complete the first challenge - a pedal car race - they’re going to have to work together.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When Skrap-It gets struck by lightning, he's suddenly smart and comes up with a plan for D-Structs to remove the Dinotrux from the crater for good.on truck! Full-on fun! Watch giant Ty Rux, his little buddy Revvit and the crew come face-to-face with evil D-Structs.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When the PALs and Snips get caught in a sandstorm, the girls must keep Snips calm and safe

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep cheats her way into being considered an adult; Grug learns he's no longer the strongest caveman and turns to a radical method for building brawn

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Sandy can't join animal wrestling she poses as “Mandy Monkhuahua”; In order to help Munk, Grug sticks super worms up his nose that make him smarter

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Stormfly is captured by a new enemy, Ryker Grimborn, and the Dragon Hunters, Hiccup, Toothless and the team must rescue her before it's too late

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: As Hiccup and Snotlout race to rescue the others from Ryker and the Dragon Hunters, they don't realize Dagur and Heather are working with the enemy

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Meteor Part 1

programme.title: Meteor Part 2
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Wanted

programme.title: The Librarian: The Quest For The Spear
programme.desc: A bookworm becomes the librarian. Same night a magical spear gets stolen and he's off to get some real life experience around the globe on his quest for the spear - starting with being thrown off a plane over Amazonas by his cute helper.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight

programme.title: Fist From Shaolin

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It is 1872, and a British inventor, a Chinese thief and a French artist set off to circumnavigate the globe in 80 days. They travel by land, air, sea, and in-line skates in order to beat the clock and finish where they started.

programme.title: The Hunger Games

programme.title: The Triangle Part 1

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: The Seasons
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will "get rid of all your worries and all your concerns."

programme.title: Unkind Ladies
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: Our Happy Days

programme.title: The First Night with the Duke
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.desc: The training academy from Dogs Are Incredible! For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression, or excessive barking from their beloved dogs who've become part of the family. programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Queen's House
programme.desc: A revenge story about a woman in the top 1% starting over from the ground up to reclaim her stolen life and find her true 'home'. A passionate drama of people striving to regain the true meaning of life.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: ROUND PLAYLIST
programme.desc: The program is intended to promote exchanges between Korea and ASEAN countries by utilizing popular music.

programme.title: Dogs are Incredible 2
programme.desc: The training academy from Dogs Are Incredible! For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression, or excessive barking from their beloved dogs who've become part of the family. Experts from various fields provide customized training methods and tailored advice — helping unruly dogs transform into well-behaved companions!

programme.title: The First Night with the Duke
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover’s death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a Southern spin on the classic French-inspired chicken fricassee. She starts by seasoning and browning the chicken, then simmers it in a sauce made with vegetables, cream and white wine.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Downtime is very rare in the life of Theresa Caputo. In this episode, Theresa nurtures her soul by cherishing moments with family and prioritizing self-care, all while graciously channeling spirit.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: Throughout the world, there have been many sightings of bizarre creatures that cannot be explained by science. Is it possible that there are terrifying monsters, lurking in the shadows of planet Earth?

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick's in the big apple to see if he can compute a deal on a rare piece of tech. Will this enticing piece lure Rick in? A seller brings a special edition Stan Lee Funko Pop. Will Corey make a super deal?

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: During World War II, the Nazis created specialised Death Camps for killing prisoners. At Sobibor, a group of Jews were forced to keep the camp operational, engineered a daring escape that saved many lives.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: Some secrets refuse to stay buried. Whether it’s illicit cargo in a frozen lake, a stolen masterpiece worth millions, or a brothel hidden in the shadow of the Capitol—the truth always resurfaces.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos' search for treasure-filled, lost Nazi U-Boats takes an unexpected turn when a 98-year-old local eyewitness gives him a tip that changes the course of his investigation.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's one of the most famous prehistoric monuments on Earth. A mysterious arrangement of stones that have adorned the English countryside for millennia. But nobody knows how the landmark was built or why.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: After conducting an experiment that reveals more evidence of incredible phenomena in the skies above Skinwalker Ranch, the team learns that the mystery of the property may be located deep underground.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Deep beneath the sands of Egypt lie 24 enormous sarcophagi—and every one of them is empty. What purpose might these giant tombs have served? And is it possible that they were designed by alien visitors?

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion (S3)
programme.desc: Troy and Pickle help a friend look for his lost dog. Bill and Tes search for pythons in a spot ravaged by wildfires. Zak and Bruce investigate an abandoned boat yard.

programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy a handful of experimental narrative fashion films with top models starring, it’s one of the most artistic ways to follow the latest collections!

programme.title: The Deadly Duo
programme.desc: The prince of the Sung Dynasty is captured by the Chin invaders and guarded by top martial arts masters. Two powerful patriots need to fight the overwhelming odds and pull off the impossible: to rescue the royal Prince and get out of the Chin stronghold alive.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: The Flying Dagger
programme.desc: The Yu family and the Green Dragon clan became enemies when the Yu daughter killed the clan head’s son, who was a rapist and murderer. The Green Dragon leader wounds the head of the Yu family with his flying daggers, and a wandering swordsman saves the family using his own flying dagger skills. However, his allegiances and motives are unclear.

programme.title: The Locksmith
programme.desc: Locksmith Master Shan suffers from dementia and passes on his skills to Hao Ren, who surpasses him. Detective Liu often seeks Hao Ren's help and they become good friends. When Hao Ren reunites with an old friend one day, he accidentally unfolds the truth behind Shan's wife's disappearance, leading to a chain of mysterious events.

programme.title: Lost Love
programme.desc: Mei tries to get over the death of her young son by becoming a foster parent. For 13 years, Mei’s dedication to the foster child leads her to neglect her husband and the true needs of the child. It is only through the child’s unintentional help that the couple finally manages to salvage their relationship.

programme.title: The Flag of Iron
programme.desc: When super director Chang Cheh found new talent and blood with "The Five Venoms" actors, most of which were trained in the highly acrobatic Chinese opera and well versed with exotic martial arts weapons, this created a new spark for his use of bizarre weapons in his films. The Flag Of Iron is one of 20 movies that he directed featuring the utterly flabbergasting and physically exhausting action bits created by these five dudes. You have the good guys from the righteous clan versus the bad guys from the villainous clan and it's so filled with "don't-blink-or-you-will-miss-something" gags, you will need to watch it over and over again so you can see the things you missed.

programme.title: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Liu serves his triad society loyally and tries to live a respectable life, but over time his good intentions lead him to an all-out gang war with a startling conclusion.

programme.title: My Rebellious Son
programme.desc: A corrupt official attempts to steal a priceless Buddha statue from a temple to please a group of Westerners. Luckily, Doctor Zhang and his son manage to defeat the Western boxers, the Japanese Kendo opponents and the Western longsword fighters with Chinese kung fu, thus saving the Buddha statue.

programme.title: Shaolin Hand Lock
programme.desc: Li Cheng Ying’s father was set up and killed by his old friend Ling Hao. Li, who has learnt “Shaolin Hand Lock” from his father, is on a mission to avenge his death. He works as an undercover guard at Ling’s house where he meets his long-lost brother, and the two team up to take revenge for their father against Ling.

programme.title: Behind the Yellow Line
programme.desc: A fresh graduate, Paul, strikes up an acquaintance with a pretty young girl, Monica, on the metro. Monica is involved in a love affair with a married man while Paul is also pursued by a rich girl. When Paul vows his true love for Monica, she suggests playing hide-and-seek with him in the metro to decide if they are fated to be together.

programme.title: Peg O' My Heart
programme.desc: Psychiatrist Dr. Man begins treating night-shift taxi driver Choi, who is afraid to sleep and can no longer distinguish dreams from reality. During therapy, Dr. Man becomes haunted by his own disturbing and perplexing dreams. Are these night terrors the result of repressed memories, or the price of uncovering the ghosts hidden in Choi’s past?

programme.title: The Kid With A Tattoo
programme.desc: Young Bao Tong witnesses the brutal murder of his kung fu master by a vicious villain. A large eagle tattoo on Bao’s chest was spotted by the killer as he escapes. Can Bao escape from the killer?

programme.title: The Avenging Eagle
programme.desc: Qi Ming Xing, an assassin of the Iron Boat Clan, decides to quit the clan. When hunted by the clan, he is saved by Swordsman Zhuo Yi Fan. Zhuo accidentally discovers that Qi is the killer of his wife, but forgives him after knowing Qi’s guilt over her death. The two finally team up to destroy the evil clan.

programme.title: Mama's Affair
programme.desc: Former talent manager Mei Fung stays home to take care of her husband and son after retirement. She decides to re-enter the entertainment business to find her value in life, and successfully transforms a local restaurant delivery boy, Fong Ching, into a young pop idol. This makes her teenage son, Jonathan, intensely jealous of Fong Ching.

programme.title: American Girl
programme.desc: 13 year-old Fen is uprooted from LA and moves to Taipei in early 2003, when her mother is diagnosed with breast cancer. She struggles to adjust to her new life with a new school and long-separated father, and drifts away from her mother. When her younger sister is misdiagnosed with SARS, they finally open up to each other during quarantine.

programme.title: Mad Fate
programme.desc: A Master fortune teller predicts that Tung, a born psychopath, will be imprisoned for murder and tries to change his fate. A veteran detective believes Tung is a psychopathic serial killer after witnessing him kill a cat, and pursues him relentlessly. Can the Master change Tung’s mad fate?

programme.title: Oplan Baleleng
programme.desc: Oplan Baleleng was the name given to a paramilitary group made up of hardened convicts tasked with the rescue of kidnap for ransom victims. In truth though, theirs was a murder mission.

programme.title: Alabang Girls (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Alabang, an upscale suburb on the South of Manila, was the setting for this wacky tale of boys from the wrong side of the tracks, who easily fall for rich and pretty girls, who lived in Alabang.

programme.title: Agaw-Armas
programme.desc: Benjie (Bong Revilla) is a hotel security officer who has just about everything going for him. His life seems almost perfect. Then, he is linked to a shooting incident tha may forever change his life.

programme.title: Palabra De Honor (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Eddie Garcia headed this all-star cast in a searing drama about a millionaire patriarch and the power he wielded among the people in an entire town.

programme.title: Isla Paraiso
programme.desc: A series of inexplicable and mind-boggling twists of incidents inside the hacienda take place as the animosity between two sisters heightens.

programme.title: Pangako Ng Kahapon
programme.desc: Set in the picturesque abaca plantations of Bicol with the perfect Mayon Volcano in the background, this is a film about a greedy family, corrupt politicians and the hapless tenants whose lives crossed their path.

programme.title: Manong Gang
programme.desc: Birds of the same feathers, flock together. But in Brandon and Toni’s case,their first meeting is just the beginning of numerous encounters that almost always lead to first fights.

programme.title: Bikining Itim
programme.desc: Before Sally (Vivian Velez) leaves for Japan, she bequeaths Andoy (Joey Marquez) her black bikini to remind him of her absence, that is, in spite of his little dalliance with Tina (Cristina Gonzales).

programme.title: Tayong Dalawa
programme.desc: Sharon Cuneta teamed up with Gabby Concepcion in what is considered their best work together. Her coming to terms with her new, free lifestyle and how she cope with his former girlfriend, who refused to let him go is the gist of the movie.

programme.title: Kosa
programme.desc: Two convicts develop a close friendship because of their common goal which was to exact revenge for their loved ones. Their obssession of getting back at their enemies drove them to escape and to alienate all the people around them including their fellow inmates.

programme.title: Blue Jeans Gang
programme.desc: Brian (Keempee de Leon), Alan (Gary Estrada), Jerry (Kier Legaspi), Tom (Joko Diaz), Jojo(Michael Rivero), and Pat (Dennis Padilla) call themselves the BLUE JEANS GANG. They consider themselves to be more like brothers than friends.

programme.title: Pre, Hanggang Sa Huli
programme.desc: Brandon is a hard-hitting cop on the trail of a drug syndicate. Cooper is a cop from a small barrio in the province. They were as different as night is from day, but they ended up as partners and very close friends.

programme.title: Kumukulong Dugo
programme.desc: Kumukulong Dugo

programme.desc: When a famed linguist who was injured while studying the caves awakens from a coma, he possesses fantastic powers and goes on a dangerous mission.

programme.desc: Benton dazzles the staff; Lewis suspects a doctor/patient is not what he seems; Ross agrees to coach Jake's Little League team.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S3 4

programme.title: Storage Hunters S5 5
programme.desc: A mysterious vault has everyone wondering what could be inside. Jesse gets nostalgic over a bin that takes him back to his childhood. Brandon and Lori clean up more than they clear out. And T Money finds out the hard way that, sometimes, it's not better to be safe than sorry.
